Author: liliekintsugi
Name: XIVPath Connect
Punchline: Synchro ta progression FFXIV vers XIVPath.
Description: Synchronise automatiquement ta progression FFXIV vers XIVPath : niveaux de jobs, quetes MSQ, donjons/defis/raids accomplis. Synchro plugin-first avec dedup, telemetry et signaux gameplay precis (job actif, quete suivie, roulettes daily, groupe).

Author: goat, Maple, liliekintsugi
Name: Ultrawide Cutscenes
Punchline: Remove letterboxing from cutscenes on ultrawide monitors.
Description:
This plugin removes the letterboxing bars when watching cutscenes on ultrawide monitors.
Beware! You may see things that you are not supposed to be seeing, such as upcoming NPCs popping in or T-posing.

Thanks to aers for finding this.
